description: A building inspector has completed the final inspection for a new home and marked it as 'Passed'. An operator must close out the permit.

nodes.task_description: Receive a notification that a building permit's final inspection has passed.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent acknowledges the update from the inspection system.

nodes.task_description: Locate the corresponding building permit in the permit management system.
Change the permit's status to 'Closed' and issue the official 'Certificate of Occupancy' to the homeowner.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully finalizes the permit process.
